summary: Read-only plan. #88900 is explicitly listed by the job as a security-signal ref and is quarantined with route_security. #88944 is the same Discord progress italic-truncation family as the linked closed source issue #88895, but no close/merge/fix mutation is planned because the canonical candidate is quarantined and the main-branch fix commit is evidence rather than a hydrated candidate-fix item.
